events.title: Mats and Margaritas: DIY Doormat Workshop
events.location: Board & Brush Creative Studio - Centennial Hills
events.description: Picture this: you, your favorite people, and the perfect blend of creativity and cocktails as you craft a custom doormat that'll make every guest jealous before they even step inside. This intimate workshop combines hands-on DIY magic with that celebratory margarita energy we all need more of in our lives.

events.title: Mats and Margaritas: DIY Doormat Workshop
events.description: This perfectly crafted afternoon combines creative expression with social sipping as you design a custom doormat that'll make your guests smile before they even knock. It's the kind of hands-on experience that feeds your soul while giving you something gorgeous to take home – plus, the margaritas don't hurt either.

events.title: Mindset x Movement: Run Into The New Season
events.description: Join a curated running collective for an invigorating morning that perfectly balances mindful movement with the fresh energy of a new season. This isn't just another group run—it's your invitation to connect with like-minded souls while setting intentions that will carry you beautifully into what's next.

events.title: Girls Paint at the Park
events.description: Elevated outdoor paint experience with mocktails and a floral bar.

events.title: Black People Hike LV: State of the Trail Civic Unity Hike
events.description: Join this meaningful community gathering that combines the healing power of nature with important civic dialogue as you explore the scenic trails of Lone Mountain. It's a beautiful opportunity to connect with like-minded hikers while engaging in thoughtful conversations about our community's future in one of Vegas's most stunning outdoor settings.

events.title: The Cozmic Lounge: Y2K Night
events.description: Step back into the iconic Y2K era with Cozmic Mocktail Club, where metallic fits and nostalgic beats create the perfect throwback vibe that only Vegas can deliver. This is your chance to experience the electric energy of millennium nostalgia in one of the city's most stylish underground venues.

events.title: Saturdays Are For the Girls Workout
events.description: You know that feeling when you want to get your sweat on but also catch up with your crew without the awkward small talk of a regular gym class? This is for the woman who values her Saturday morning ritual but craves something more intentional than another solo gum session. Think high-energy vibes, actual connections, and the kind of workout that leaves you feeling like you conquered more than just your fitness goals.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Spring Fling Pilates Social
events.description: Spring is calling for a fresh fitness moment, and this Pilates social is exactly the kind of elevated wellness experience that discerning Las Vegas locals know makes all the difference. Picture yourself flowing through intentional movement with like-minded souls who understand that the best connections happen when you're investing in yourself.

events.title: Clay & Chisme
events.description: Join us for the perfect blend of creativity and conversation at The Pottery Shop, where you'll get your hands dirty crafting beautiful ceramics while sharing stories and secrets with fellow creatives. It's the kind of evening where meaningful connections are made over messy clay and flowing chisme — exactly what your soul needs right now.

events.title: Plant Bingo
events.description: Get ready for the most delightfully unexpected evening where your love for greenery meets the thrill of bingo in Vegas' coziest plant haven. This isn't your grandmother's bingo night – it's where plant parents and curious souls gather for an evening of friendly competition, botanical prizes, and the kind of authentic connections that make this city feel like home.

events.title: F The Bar: Mixology Workshop - Saddle Up Sip
events.description: If you're the type who knows the difference between good vodka and great vodka and thinks most cocktail classes are too basic, this mixology workshop at Ferguson's is calling your name. You'll learn to craft elevated ranch-inspired cocktails that actually belong in your repertoire, not just your Instagram feed, all while connecting with other women who appreciate the art of a perfectly balanced drink.

events.title: R&B Yoga + Meditation Class
events.location: 3110 E Sunset Rd unit d Las Vegas, NV
events.description: This soulful R&B-inspired yoga and meditation experience by Qui 2 Balance is exactly what you need to sink into rhythm and breathe into balance this Friday evening. You'll flow through gentle movements synced to smooth R&B beats, practice restorative breathwork, and close with grounding meditation in an atmosphere of pure compassion and ease.

events.title: Saturno Pilates
events.description: This isn't your typical studio session—it's a transformative Pilates experience set against the eclectic backdrop of Electric Mushroom, where wellness meets Vegas' creative underground. Trust us when we say this fusion of mindful movement and artistic atmosphere will leave you feeling both centered and inspired in ways you never expected.

events.title: The Zodiac Series: Aries Pilates
events.description: Channel your fiery Aries energy with an invigorating Pilates session designed specifically for the bold and determined ram, set against the stunning backdrop of BLVD Rooftop. This celestial-inspired workout combines the intensity Aries craves with mindful movement that will leave you feeling as powerful and radiant as the stars themselves.

events.title: Body Butter Workshop - Better Days
events.description: Learn the art of creating luxurious, nourishing body butters in this hands-on workshop that's perfect for anyone looking to elevate their self-care routine with handcrafted wellness. This intimate experience will have you blending natural ingredients like a pro while connecting with fellow wellness enthusiasts who share your passion for clean beauty and mindful living.

events.title: Romanticize Your Pilates
events.description: This dreamy Pilates experience transforms your usual workout into something utterly enchanting, blending mindful movement with an atmosphere that feels like pure self-care luxury. Trust me, this is the kind of session that leaves you feeling both beautifully stretched and completely renewed – exactly what your spring wellness routine has been missing.

events.title: The Art of Cake
events.description: Picture this: a gathering where fellow cake enthusiasts come together to share their most treasured recipes and creations in the cozy, design-forward space that is Uncommons. It's the kind of delightfully unexpected afternoon where you'll discover your new favorite bakery secret, swap stories behind family recipes, and leave with both a satisfied sweet tooth and genuine new connections.

events.title: PopStroke Las Vegas X Move With Madi
events.description: Picture this: a perfect Vegas morning where you'll flow through an energizing workout with the incredible Madi, then unwind with mini golf and mimosas at the most Instagram-worthy spot in town. This is that rare combination of wellness and play that leaves you feeling both accomplished and completely refreshed – trust me, you'll want to clear your Saturday for this one.

events.title: WISE Las Vegas Headshot & Professional Development Workshop
events.description: At this event, you'll walk away with professional headshots that actually capture your personality alongside career development strategies from women who've built real influence in this city. The intimate setting at Ariva means you're networking with intention rather than working a room full of business cards you'll never remember.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Rooftop Soundbath & Yoga
events.description: Picture yourself flowing through gentle yoga poses as the sun sets over the Vegas skyline, then melting into pure bliss during a healing soundbath under the stars. This rooftop sanctuary experience combines movement, meditation, and those magical desert views that make you feel like you've discovered the city's best-kept wellness secret.

events.title: Spring Fling Bachata Class & Social
events.description: Have you been interested in learning a few moves to spice up your bachata? This event is perfect balace of instruction and application. No registration or cover needed. Drink specials are available from 5-6pm.

events.title: Rooftop: Soundbath & Yoga
events.description: Escape the Vegas hustle with this perfectly curated rooftop experience that combines rejuvenating soundbath healing with sunset yoga flows - it's the kind of elevated wellness moment that makes you feel like you've discovered the city's best-kept secret. Trust me, this is where the mindful Vegas crowd gathers to reset and recharge while taking in those stunning desert views that remind you why this city is pure magic.

events.title: You Deserve Your Flowers Pilates for Healthcare Workers
events.description: The morning air at Sunset Park carries a different kind of energy when it's filled with the quiet strength of those who spend their days caring for others, finally taking an hour to breathe deeply and stretch toward the desert sky. There's something profoundly moving about watching scrubs-clad heroes flow through sun salutations together, the distant hum of the city serving as a gentle reminder that they've stepped away from the chaos to honor themselves in this sacred pocket of green space.

events.title: Morning Hike & Yoga in the Park
events.description: Start your weekend with intention at this perfectly curated morning hike and yoga experience in one of Vegas's most scenic spots - it's the kind of mindful adventure that locals treasure but visitors rarely discover. This is your chance to connect with like-minded souls while stretching both your body and your perspective of what wellness looks like in the desert.

events.title: Strings By the Sunset
events.description: Picture this: an intimate evening where classical strings meet golden hour magic at Ferguson's Downtown, creating the kind of atmospheric moment that feels both sophisticated and soul-stirring. This is exactly the type of curated musical experience where you'll find yourself completely transported, surrounded by fellow culture enthusiasts who appreciate the finer moments in life.

events.title: Restore & Replenish Retreat
events.description: A full women's wellness retreat focused on reconnecting with self.

events.title: Sistas Y Hermanas Black & Brown Unity Hike
events.description: Join this powerful celebration of Black and Brown sisterhood as we connect with nature and each other on the scenic Hoover Dam Trail, where breathtaking views meet meaningful conversations. It's the kind of soul-nourishing experience that reminds you why community and wellness go hand in hand—plus you'll discover one of Nevada's most stunning hiking spots through the eyes of incredible women.

events.title: Skye Canyon Pickleball Social
events.description: Whether you're curious about the fastest-growing sport in America or ready to compete, this community gathering offers the perfect introduction to pickleball with free clinics, novice and intermediate tournaments, plus food trucks to fuel the fun. It's that rare event where you can learn something new, break a sweat, and connect with fellow Las Vegans all in one beautiful morning at the park.

events.title: Pool-Lates: Pilates at Hideout Pool
events.description: Picture this: you're flowing through your favorite Pilates moves while floating on water, surrounded by the luxe vibes of Golden Nugget's stunning pool deck. It's the kind of workout that makes you feel like you've discovered the ultimate wellness secret – equal parts challenging and utterly rejuvenating.

events.title: Beginner Yoga in the Park with Hustle & Yoga Flow
events.description: There's something magical about flowing through gentle poses under the open sky, and this beginner-friendly session with Hustle & Yoga Flow is the perfect way to ease into your wellness journey while soaking up Hollywood Park's serene atmosphere. Trust me, you'll leave feeling both grounded and energized, plus you'll discover that yoga outdoors hits completely differently than any studio class ever could.

events.title: Breath & Beats: Yoga With a DJ
events.description: Most yoga classes stick to predictable playlists, but this one features a live DJ reading the room and mixing beats that actually sync with your flow transitions. At just $10, it's the kind of accessible luxury that makes you wonder why more studios don't elevate the experience this thoughtfully.

events.title: Formation Haus Soft Opening with Pilates Activations
events.description: This isn't just another studio launch party with mimosas and Instagram backdrops—Formation Haus is debuting with actual Pilates classes woven throughout their soft opening, letting you experience their teaching style and equipment quality before committing to a membership. At $50, you're getting first access to sample what could become your new movement sanctuary, plus the chance to secure founding member rates if their approach resonates with how you want to move your body.

events.title: Project P4: Pickleball, Pilates, and Pool
events.description: The Plaza's rooftop transforms into a sun-soaked wellness playground where the satisfying pop of pickleball paddles mingles with the splash of poolside workouts and the focused breathing of mat-based flows. There's an infectious energy here that feels distinctly Vegas – part resort luxury, part community sweat session – where you'll find yourself genuinely surprised by how much fun fitness can be when it's wrapped in good music, city views, and the kind of day party vibe that makes you forget you're technically exercising.

events.title: Pi-Lattes On the Green
events.description: This isn't your typical studio Pilates class squeezed between four walls, but a full-body flow session happening outdoors on PopStroke's expansive green space where fresh air and natural light become part of your workout equation. At $28, you're getting premium instruction in a setting that makes breaking a sweat feel less like punishment and more like the kind of thoughtful self-care that actually sticks.

events.title: Chair Fitness with The Overcoming Warriors Club
events.description: Join The Overcoming Warriors Club for an empowering chair fitness session that proves movement is for every body, regardless of mobility or fitness level. This inclusive workout at Sheree Michelle Fitness Studio creates a supportive community where strength meets accessibility, and you'll leave feeling accomplished and energized.

events.title: Yoga In the Park
events.description: Join Solely Committed Co. for a evening session of yoga in the park. Each session is community offerings and donations are accepted. Please reach out to @breathewithraven for any additional information.

events.title: Pilates and Praise
events.description: There's something absolutely magical about combining mindful movement with uplifting music as the sun sets over the park, and this unique fusion class delivers exactly that soul-nourishing experience you've been craving. Trust me when I say this isn't your typical workout. It's a beautiful blend of Pilates flow and faith based vibes that will leave you feeling both physically strengthened and spiritually renewed.

events.title: Paws & Pause: Puppy Yoga
events.description: The fact that this puppy yoga session happens inside a permanent jewelry studio means you're practicing downward dog while surrounded by delicate gold chains and sparkling ear cuffs, creating an unexpectedly luxe backdrop for your wellness hour. At $20, it's the kind of perfectly weird Las Vegas experience that somehow makes complete sense once you're there, stretching alongside adorable puppies in between display cases of dainty body jewelry.

events.title: Vegas Latinas: Makeup y Mas
events.description: You know that feeling when you discover a hidden gem that perfectly blends beauty, culture, and community? This intimate workshop celebrates Latina beauty traditions while teaching you insider makeup techniques that will have everyone asking who did your look.

events.title: Mami Pilates Club: Pilates & Perro/Dalee
events.description: This is the fusion class you didn't know you needed—combining the core-strengthening power of Pilates with the rhythmic energy of perreo and dalee for a workout that's equal parts sculpting and celebration. Trust me, you'll leave class feeling stronger, more confident, and with moves that'll have everyone asking where you learned to flow like that.

events.title: Poses For Paws
events.location: UnCommons PS3 Rooftop, 6880 Helen Toland Street Las Vegas, NV 89113
events.description: Join this heartwarming morning of yoga, music, and community where every stretch makes a difference - 100% of proceeds support local animal rescue while you flow with purpose on a stunning Vegas rooftop. This is where wellness meets compassion, complete with adoptable pups, raffles, and the kind of meaningful connections that make Sunday mornings unforgettable.

events.title: Spring, Coloring, Chisme
events.description: Embrace the season's creative energy at this perfectly curated blend of artistic expression and delightful conversation over cafecito. This intimate gathering at Velvet Vine Wine offers the ideal excuse to slow down, color outside the lines, and connect with like-minded souls who appreciate life's beautiful, simple pleasures.

events.title: Courtyard Cinema - Devil Wears Prada
events.description: Step into an enchanting evening of cinema magic with this intimate outdoor screening of The Devil Wears Prada, complete with cozy pajama party vibes, games, and all the movie night essentials under the stars. This is your chance to live out your main character dreams in a curated, female-focused experience that perfectly blends comfort with style in Vegas's Arts District.

events.title: Wine & Wicks at Velvet Vine Wine
events.location: 511 S Las Vegas Blvd Las Vegas, NV 89101 United States
events.description: You'll want to clear your calendar for this divine pairing of premium wines and hands-on candle crafting at one of Vegas's most intimate wine destinations. Picture yourself sipping carefully curated vintages while learning the art of creating custom scented candles—it's the perfect blend of relaxation and creativity that'll leave you with both a beautiful handmade piece and memories worth savoring.

events.title: Babes,Bites and Blankets
events.description: Join this girls' picnic day for an afternoon of connection, delicious bites, and cozy vibes that promises to be the perfect blend of relaxation and socializing. This intimate gathering is curated for those in the know, offering a beautiful opportunity to meet like-minded women in a charming outdoor setting.

events.title: Aprende Conmigo: The Matcha Experience
events.description: Dive deep into the ancient art of matcha with this immersive experience that'll have you whisking like a true tea ceremony master in no time. This is your chance to discover the meditative ritual behind every perfect cup while connecting with fellow wellness enthusiasts who appreciate life's most refined pleasures.

events.title: The Calatina Wine Mixer
events.description: This exclusive wine experience brings together Vegas's most discerning palates for an evening of exceptional vintages and elevated company. It's the kind of intimate gathering where meaningful connections are made over perfectly curated selections - exactly what our sophisticated community craves.

events.title: Pilatesland with Core & Pour Social Club
events.description: If you're the type who treats your body like the temple it is but knows that breaking a sweat should come with good company and even better energy, this is your Saturday morning salvation. You'll get that deep burn that makes you feel alive, then stick around to connect with women who understand that wellness isn't just about the workout — it's about building a life that feels as strong as you are.

events.title: The Overcoming Warriors Club: Create Bubble Bars
events.location: Honey Vintage and Bath, 231 W Charleston Blvd suite 140, Las Vegas, NV, USA
events.description: Join the Overcoming Warriors Club at Honey Vintage and Bath for an empowering afternoon where you'll craft luxurious bubble bars while connecting with an incredible community of resilient women. This isn't just about creating beautiful bath products, it's about celebrating your strength, sharing stories, and leaving with both handmade treasures and newfound friendships that'll remind you how powerful you truly are.

events.title: Junk Journal Club(Western Themed)
events.description: Channel your inner cowgirl at this delightfully nostalgic crafting session where you'll create a beautifully weathered journal filled with vintage ephemera, pressed flowers, and all those dreamy western-inspired touches that make your heart sing. Trust me, this is the perfect excuse to slow down, get your hands dirty with some serious creative magic, and leave with a one-of-a-kind keepsake that captures the free-spirited energy we're all craving.

events.title: Pilates at the ranch
events.description: There's something absolutely magical about taking your Pilates practice outdoors, especially when it's set against the stunning backdrop of a working ranch where fresh air and natural beauty become part of your workout. This is the kind of experience that will have you feeling both grounded and elevated.

events.title: Driven & Defined: A Land Rover x TruFusion Pilates Experience
events.description: This is an exclusive Pilates session that perfectly marries luxury automotive elegance with mindful movement, hosted in the sleek showroom of Land Rover Las Vegas where you'll flow alongside their stunning vehicles. This isn't just any wellness class—it's a curated experience where TruFusion's expert instructors guide you through a rejuvenating practice that embodies the same precision and strength as the iconic cars surrounding you.

events.title: Houseplant Bingo
events.description: This delightfully quirky plant-themed bingo experience is exactly the kind of unexpected Vegas gem that locals love to discover - where your green thumb meets good vibes in the most entertaining way possible. It's the perfect blend of community connection and botanical knowledge that'll have you seeing the city's creative side beyond the Strip.

events.title: The Lip Lab : MAC Cosmetics X Spa Girl In the City Experience
events.location: MAC Cosmetics @ Dillard's Downtown Summerlin, 1980 Festival Plaza Drive Las Vegas, NV 89135
events.description: Discover your signature lip shade at this intimate MAC Cosmetics experience where you'll test personalized shades, work with professional artists, and sip champagne while learning what truly complements your skin tone. With only 30 spots available, this curated beauty lab includes professional application, a photobooth moment, charcuterie, and an exclusive gift bag—plus the chance to get $25 back when you purchase $100 in products.

events.title: Slow Sundays Club LV — Gentle Yoga + JoJo Cafe
events.description: This intimate Sunday morning ritual combines gentle yoga flows with exclusive JoJo Cafe tastings, creating the perfect antidote to Vegas's high-energy scene. It's the kind of hidden gem where you'll find yourself surrounded by like-minded souls seeking a softer, more intentional start to their week.

events.title: Flowers & Friends: Pot Painting
events.location: Springs Cafe at the Springs Preserve, 333 S Valley View Blvd, Las Vegas, NV
events.description: This adorable spring DIY experience lets you paint your own terracotta flower pot while connecting with like-minded women in an air-conditioned oasis before Vegas summer hits. You'll leave with your custom creation plus soil and seeds to start your own plant baby – it's the perfect blend of creativity, community, and springtime magic that the coolest girls are already talking about.

events.title: Sunset Yoga in the Park🌱
events.location: 9275 S Buffalo Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89178, USA
events.description: There's something absolutely magical about practicing yoga as the desert sky transforms into a canvas of amber and rose, and this outdoor session captures that perfect Vegas golden hour energy we're always chasing. You'll leave feeling both grounded and glowing, with that serene post-flow radiance that only comes from moving your body in nature's most photogenic lighting.

events.title: Neurospicy Pickleball Social
events.description: This isn't your typical pickleball game—it's a celebration of neurodivergent minds coming together for some friendly competition and genuine connection on the court. You'll find yourself among a wonderfully diverse group of players who get that sometimes the best conversations happen between serves, and every swing is a chance to be authentically you.

events.title: Manos y Masa: Papusa Making Workshop with Vegas Latinas
events.description: Get ready to roll up your sleeves and dive into the art of authentic pupusa making alongside the incredible community at Vegas Latinas, where you'll learn traditional techniques passed down through generations. This hands-on experience at Voodoo Brewery combines the best of cultural connection, delicious homemade comfort food, and the kind of evening that feeds both your soul and your Instagram feed.

events.title: Horses X Pilates
events.description: Elevated morning combining horses and Pilates movement.

events.title: New Vista Wine Walk at Downtown Summerlin
events.location: Downtown Summerlin, 1825 Festival Plaza Drive, Las Vegas, NV 89135
events.description: This beloved Las Vegas tradition since 2004 offers the perfect sophisticated evening out with 18+ wine tasting stations while supporting an incredible local cause that's been empowering people with intellectual and developmental disabilities for 40 years. With souvenir glassware, premium VIP tastings, and even dog-friendly vibes, it's the kind of meaningful social experience that lets you sip, stroll, and make a real difference in your community.

events.title: Rooftop Ride: Under The Lights
events.description: Get ready to elevate your fitness game with this exclusive rooftop cycling experience that combines stunning city views with an invigorating workout under the evening lights. This is the kind of insider fitness event that will have you feeling like you've discovered the city's best-kept wellness secret.

events.title: Mothers Day at The Ranch
events.location: 4975 N Miller Ln Las Vegas, NV 89149, USA
events.description: This heartwarming Mother's Day celebration at a local ranch offers the perfect blend of relaxation and family fun, with complimentary chair massages for the first 25 moms, unlimited animal cuddles, and special craft activities. It's an insider's gem where military families get discounted rates and everyone can experience the therapeutic joy of connecting with horses and farm animals in a beautiful ranch setting.

events.title: Perfume & Pastries Event
events.location: Bottega Exchange | 6675 S Tenaya Way #200 Las Vegas, NV 89113
events.description: This enchanting experience combines the best of both worlds - indulgent pastry tastings and the artistry of crafting your own signature 30mL fragrance inspired by gourmet delights. Guided by expert perfumers in an intimate setting, you'll create a custom scent and take home a luxurious premium fragrance bottle with personalized souvenir label as the perfect keepsake from this celebration of creativity and motherhood.

events.title: Model x Runway Class with Miss Arizona
events.description: Step into the modeling world with this exclusive runway masterclass led by Miss Arizona USA 2025, where you'll learn industry fundamentals and perfect your catwalk technique. This insider experience covers everything from agency expectations to heel techniques, giving you the professional edge you need to strut with confidence.
